name: search-docs
description: Search for up-to-date version-specific documentation related to this project and its packages. This tool will search Laravel hosted documentation based on the packages installed and is perfect for all Laravel ecosystem packages. Laravel, Inertia, Pest, Livewire, Filament, Nova, Tailwind, and more. You must use this tool to search for Laravel-ecosystem docs before using other approaches. The results provided are for this project's package version and does not cover all versions of the package.

queries.description: List of queries to perform, pass multiple if you aren't sure if it is "toggle" or "switch", for example

packages.description: Package names to limit searching to from application-info. Useful if you know the package(s) you need. i.e. laravel/framework, inertiajs/inertia-laravel, @inertiajs/react

token_limit.description: Maximum number of tokens to return in the response. Defaults to 3,000 tokens, maximum 1,000,000 tokens. If results are truncated, or you need more complete documentation, increase this value (e.g.5000, 10000)
